title: Lazy Sunday Basque French Yellow Onion Quiche
description: A savory and satisfying quiche featuring caramelized yellow onions, perfect for a lazy Sunday morning. This low-fat-friendly dish is baked to perfection on a hot stone plate.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the pie crust and place it on a hot stone plate.
In a large skillet, caramelize the sliced yellow onions over medium heat for 20 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, low-fat milk, salt, and black pepper.
Add the grated cheese to the egg mixture and stir to combine.
Add the caramelized onions to the egg mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
Drizzle the olive oil over the quiche.
Bake the quiche for 35 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the center is set.
